=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'Preview'" ===

--- file:///.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics redundantSchemaTagIdentifier:warning
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class Preview
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<Preview>()("Preview", {
    value: Schema.String
  }) {}
